title: ESCC Product Knowledge Store Schema
description: The approved 'what we sell' knowledge layer (skills/product-knowledge) plus the persona/role-keyed extension (ADR-0012). A flat array of entries. New type values (objection/pain/battlecard) and tags (role/competitor) are OPTIONAL and additive: legacy entries validate unchanged. The candidate store holds the SAME entry shape (one taxonomy) as JSONL lines, differing only by approved:false + untrusted:true; approved:true together with untrusted:true is rejected (the fabrication firewall). role/segment/competitor are strings here (shape only); controlled-vocabulary membership is enforced at ingest against config/knowledge-vocab.json, not in this schema, so the vocab can grow without a schema change.

allOf.$comment: Fabrication firewall (ADR-0012): an approved entry can never be untrusted.
Capability types carry their statement in `text`.
An objection carries an abstracted pattern + an approved response (no identity).
A pain is a persona-to-pain map entry: the role it afflicts + the pain.
A battlecard carries the competitor, our differentiation, and a guardrail.

resonance.$comment: DEFERRED (ADR-0012): human-write-only and unwired. A person populates this from the outcome ledger; nothing in this task computes, infers, or auto-populates it. `updated_by` is required so it cannot be written without a human attribution.
